texts.label: text
texts.orig: Set within 40 acres of landscaped tropical gardens at the edge of Kilifi Creek, Mnarani Beach Club provides guests with magnificent views of the Indian Ocean and the multi-hued waters of the Creek below, and with the perfect setting and amenities for the ultimate seaside holiday.
texts.text: Set within 40 acres of landscaped tropical gardens at the edge of Kilifi Creek, Mnarani Beach Club provides guests with magnificent views of the Indian Ocean and the multi-hued waters of the Creek below, and with the perfect setting and amenities for the ultimate seaside holiday.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Mnarani's restaurant serves a carefully selected assortment of mouth-watering starters, mains and desserts The Main Bar forms part of the open-plan dining and lounge area; and serves house wines, beers, spirits, cocktails and mocktails
texts.text: Mnarani's restaurant serves a carefully selected assortment of mouth-watering starters, mains and desserts The Main Bar forms part of the open-plan dining and lounge area; and serves house wines, beers, spirits, cocktails and mocktails

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Add to the relaxation and restorative aspects of time spent at Mnarani Beach Club with a range of Spa treatments and pampering experiences provided by our professional therapists.
texts.text: Add to the relaxation and restorative aspects of time spent at Mnarani Beach Club with a range of Spa treatments and pampering experiences provided by our professional therapists.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: With the waters-edge so close, you can almost tip your toe in the Creek; the Beach Bar is an informal, fun location to relax and enjoy the wonderful islandlike vibe of Mnarani Beach Club.
texts.text: With the waters-edge so close, you can almost tip your toe in the Creek; the Beach Bar is an informal, fun location to relax and enjoy the wonderful islandlike vibe of Mnarani Beach Club.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Plunge into the refreshing waters of Mnarani's infinity pool, which offers endless views over the Indian Ocean and Kilifi Creek; the perfect lazing spot for a day spent poolside. Change things up and find your perfect spot at the lovely garden pool, or head down to Mnarani's private and secluded beach for a swim. Our beach's location and seclusion mean our guests experience undisturbed peace and tranquility, away from any tourist activities and bustle.
texts.text: Plunge into the refreshing waters of Mnarani's infinity pool, which offers endless views over the Indian Ocean and Kilifi Creek; the perfect lazing spot for a day spent poolside. Change things up and find your perfect spot at the lovely garden pool, or head down to Mnarani's private and secluded beach for a swim. Our beach's location and seclusion mean our guests experience undisturbed peace and tranquility, away from any tourist activities and bustle.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: If guests feel like venturing out and exploring the surrounding areas, there are a number of fantastic local excursions to be enjoyed. These guided tours are available at a fee. Price on Request.
texts.text: If guests feel like venturing out and exploring the surrounding areas, there are a number of fantastic local excursions to be enjoyed. These guided tours are available at a fee. Price on Request.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: There are a number of restaurants and bars in the area that guests can visit and enjoy. Transport services - a vehicle or water taxi can be arranged at Reception.
texts.text: There are a number of restaurants and bars in the area that guests can visit and enjoy. Transport services - a vehicle or water taxi can be arranged at Reception.

texts.text: Complimentary refreshments on arrival at reception

texts.text: Free Seasonal Water Sports Package (Introduction to sailing, windsurfing, Kayaking, Try Dive and Joyride on the Catamaran)

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Account Holders: Voucher within 14 days from requesting the booking
texts.text: Account Holders: Voucher within 14 days from requesting the booking

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 50% deposit within 21 days from requesting the booking
texts.text: 50% deposit within 21 days from requesting the booking

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Remaining balance is due minimum 14 days before arrival
texts.text: Remaining balance is due minimum 14 days before arrival

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 60 days prior to arrival date: 50% cancellation fee of the total invoice amount
texts.text: 60 days prior to arrival date: 50% cancellation fee of the total invoice amount

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 30 days or less prior to arrival: 100% cancellation fee of the total invoice amount
texts.text: 30 days or less prior to arrival: 100% cancellation fee of the total invoice amount

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · No Shows will forfeit 100% of the paid amount
texts.text: No Shows will forfeit 100% of the paid amount

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Cancellation policy is applicable to changes in rooms or room nights.
texts.text: Cancellation policy is applicable to changes in rooms or room nights.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Cancellations and changes must be requested/made in writing.
texts.text: Cancellations and changes must be requested/made in writing.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · On a deposit refund Mnarani Beach Club will deduct any bank costs incurred on behalf of the clients.
texts.text: On a deposit refund Mnarani Beach Club will deduct any bank costs incurred on behalf of the clients.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · STO rates are valid from 1 February 2025 -31 December 2025
texts.text: STO rates are valid from 1 February 2025 -31 December 2025

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Package rates are indicated in Kenyan Shilling (applicable to East African Residents) and USD (applicable to NonResidents) per person, per night.
texts.text: Package rates are indicated in Kenyan Shilling (applicable to East African Residents) and USD (applicable to NonResidents) per person, per night.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · These are NET rates which may be used by a registered Tour Operator or Travel Agent to build their packages around.
texts.text: These are NET rates which may be used by a registered Tour Operator or Travel Agent to build their packages around.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · All rates are subject to change with a minimum of 30 days notice
texts.text: All rates are subject to change with a minimum of 30 days notice

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Rates include all relevant taxes and levies as per Kenyan Law.
texts.text: Rates include all relevant taxes and levies as per Kenyan Law.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · All bookings must be done in writing through e-mail to reservations@mnaranibeachclub.com
texts.text: All bookings must be done in writing through e-mail to reservations@mnaranibeachclub.com

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Rooms do not have self-catering facilities.
texts.text: Rooms do not have self-catering facilities.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · All activities and excursions are subject to availability, are weather permitting and take place at the discretion of management and guides.
texts.text: All activities and excursions are subject to availability, are weather permitting and take place at the discretion of management and guides.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Account Holders may submit a Travel Voucher in order to confirm the booking
texts.text: Account Holders may submit a Travel Voucher in order to confirm the booking

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Mpesa, Bank Transfer, Credit Cards (Visa and Master Card only)
texts.text: Mpesa, Bank Transfer, Credit Cards (Visa and Master Card only)

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · All outstanding bills must be settled before departure. Method of payment can be:
texts.text: All outstanding bills must be settled before departure. Method of payment can be:

texts.text: Cash -Kenyan Shillings, US Dollars, GB Pounds, Euros

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Mnarani Club & Spa does not accept Travelers cheques, Diners club cards, American Express or cheques.
texts.text: Mnarani Club & Spa does not accept Travelers cheques, Diners club cards, American Express or cheques.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Children 13 years of age and older are considered an adult and will be charged adult rates
texts.text: Children 13 years of age and older are considered an adult and will be charged adult rates

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Children (3 -12 years) Sharing with adult/s: 50% of the adult sharing rate.
texts.text: Children (3 -12 years) Sharing with adult/s: 50% of the adult sharing rate.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Infants (0-2 years) Sharing with adult/s: Free.
texts.text: Infants (0-2 years) Sharing with adult/s: Free.

texts.label: list_item

texts.text: Bookings made less than 30 Days prior to arrival

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Non-Account holders: Full payment is required within 48 hours.
texts.text: Non-Account holders: Full payment is required within 48 hours.

texts.orig: · Bookings made less than 48 hours prior to arrival
texts.text: Bookings made less than 48 hours prior to arrival

texts.text: Non-account holders: 100% payment before guest arrival

texts.text: Account holders: Voucher on day of booking

texts.text: 10 paying rooms or less: agreed STO rate

texts.text: 11 paying rooms or more: 1 x room (single or sharing occupancy) at 50% discount from the RACK RATE.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Yellow fever immunization is compulsory, and you need to present your Yellow Card (International Certificate of Vaccination) when entering Kenya.
texts.text: Yellow fever immunization is compulsory, and you need to present your Yellow Card (International Certificate of Vaccination) when entering Kenya.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · The maximum number of guests a room can accommodate cannot be exceeded for health and safety reasons.
texts.text: The maximum number of guests a room can accommodate cannot be exceeded for health and safety reasons.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · All guests will be required to sign a compulsory indemnity agreement on arrival.
texts.text: All guests will be required to sign a compulsory indemnity agreement on arrival.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Evacuation procedure is displayed in accommodation rooms and public areas. Please take note.
texts.text: Evacuation procedure is displayed in accommodation rooms and public areas. Please take note.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Please report emergencies or concerns to Reception immediately.
texts.text: Please report emergencies or concerns to Reception immediately.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Mnarani Beach Club reserves the right to amend the offered STO rate for future STO agreements, should the volume and/or value of bookings from the tour operator/agent not be sufficient to justify the current STO rate.
texts.text: Mnarani Beach Club reserves the right to amend the offered STO rate for future STO agreements, should the volume and/or value of bookings from the tour operator/agent not be sufficient to justify the current STO rate.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · It is to be noted that this agreement is between Mnarani Beach Club and the Agent. The agent shall therefore, not be entitled to any leniency or indulgence in the event either the group/s or individual/s do not timeously perform their corresponding duties to the agent.
texts.text: It is to be noted that this agreement is between Mnarani Beach Club and the Agent. The agent shall therefore, not be entitled to any leniency or indulgence in the event either the group/s or individual/s do not timeously perform their corresponding duties to the agent.

texts.text: Taking photographs of official buildings, including Embassies is not allowed.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Mnarani Beach Club is situated 60km north of Mombasa on the cliffs of Kilifi Creek, just where the creek meets and merges with the Indian Ocean. This setting provides perfectly for the beach and turquoise ocean under one foot, and the activity and adventure of creek-life under the other.
texts.text: Mnarani Beach Club is situated 60km north of Mombasa on the cliffs of Kilifi Creek, just where the creek meets and merges with the Indian Ocean. This setting provides perfectly for the beach and turquoise ocean under one foot, and the activity and adventure of creek-life under the other.
